admissions_process.summary: Graduate applicants apply through the official graduate application, submit the required supporting documents, and are reviewed under the graduate requirements and faculty-specific criteria.
steps: Submit the required supporting documents listed by AOU.
Meet the graduate admission requirements, including degree equivalency and English/GEE conditions where applicable.

required_documents.summary: AOU lists the standard graduate application documents on the graduate requirements page.
items: Certified copy of bachelor's equivalency or Ministry of Higher Education evaluation where applicable
Copy of a valid national ID

language_requirements.summary: MBA and MSc applicants must sit for the English placement test unless exempted; MA TEFL requires IELTS Academic 6 or TOEFL paper-based 550 or equivalent.
notes: MBA and MSc exemptions include IELTS 7.0, paper TOEFL 600, TOEFL CBT 250, or internet-based TOEFL 100 obtained within the past 2 years.
The TEFL requirement is published separately from the MBA/MSc English placement-test rule.

tuition_model.summary: AOU publishes the current graduate tuition as USD 170 per credit hour on each of the five in-scope program detail pages.
notes: All five master's programs in scope use the same published per-credit tuition rate.
No separate graduate tuition table was retained beyond the program detail pages.

tuition_table.notes: All five master's records map to the current official program-detail tuition pages at USD 170 per credit hour.

application_fee.notes: The graduate admission fees page and student guide list the graduate application fee.

registration_fee.notes: The graduate admission fees page and student guide list the graduate registration fee.

english_placement_fee.notes: The graduate admission fees page lists the English placement test fee for MBA applicants.

gee_fee.notes: The graduate admission fees page lists the MBA Graduate Entrance Exam fee.

operational_fee.notes: Operational fees are shown on the reviewed graduate program detail pages.

nssf_annual_fee.notes: The reviewed graduate program detail pages show annual NSSF at 8,400,000 LBP.

payment_methods.summary: The graduate fees page states that tuition can be paid in installments.

payment_plans.summary: New and continuing students may pay tuition fees in installments following an installment plan.
items: Installment plan for new and continuing students

scholarships.summary: The graduate fees page states that students benefit from financial support from AGFUND.

financial_aid.summary: The official graduate fees page confirms financial support through AGFUND.

academic_calendar.summary: AOU retains official academic calendar and student-guide calendar pages; the student guide describes two regular semesters and an optional summer term.
items: Two regular semesters per academic year
Summer term duration of eight weeks

graduate_regulations.summary: The graduate FAQ confirms master's study runs on four regular semesters minimum and eight regular semesters maximum; the student guide also describes the semester structure.
items: Minimum four regular semesters (two academic years)
Maximum eight regular semesters (four academic years)
Installment payment option for tuition fees

accreditation.summary: The reviewed graduate program pages state that the programs are OU Validated and that the OU is a validating partner.

international_students.summary: No dedicated international-student graduate page was retained; the graduate requirements page relies on Ministry of Higher Education evaluation for equivalent degrees.
items: Equivalent degrees evaluated by the Ministry of Higher Education
notes: This is the only international-student-adjacent guidance retained in the reviewed official source set.
